---
title: "CFA"
author: "Sam Yu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# visualisation
# prepare for plotting
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(lavaan)
library(psych)

dat_clean <- readRDS("../data/dat_clean.rds")

hope_items <- paste0("hope_", 1:7)

hope_long <- dat_clean %>%
  select(all_of(hope_items)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "item",
    values_to = "score"
  )

```

```{r}
# histogram
ggplot(hope_long, aes(x = score)) +
  geom_bar() +
  facet_wrap(~ item, ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Hope Items",
    x = "Response",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# boxplot
ggplot(hope_long, aes(x = item, y = score)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Boxplot of Hope Items",
    x = "Item",
    y = "Score"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# Diagnosis
dat_clean %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(hope_items),
                   list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                        sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE))))
```

```{r}
# correlation matrix 
hope_data <- dat_clean %>%
  select(all_of(hope_items))

cor_matrix <- cor(hope_data, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
cor_matrix[upper.tri(cor_matrix)] <- NA
cor_matrix

cor_long <- melt(cor_matrix, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(cor_long, aes(Var1, Var2, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Correlation Matrix of Hope Items")

```

```{r}
# CFA - original preregistered model

# specify models
model_1factor <- '
Hope =~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_3 + hope_4 + hope_5 + hope_6 + hope_7
'

model_2factor <- '
Affective =~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_6 + hope_7
Cognitive =~ hope_3 + hope_4 + hope_5
'

# test for ordinal, skewed data
fit_1_wlsmv <- cfa(model_1factor, data = hope_data, estimator = "WLSMV", missing = "pairwise")
fit_2_wlsmv <- cfa(model_2factor, data = hope_data, estimator = "WLSMV", missing = "pairwise")

# preregistered method suitable for 5-7 category and not skewed data. 
fit_1 <- cfa(model_1factor, data = hope_data, estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml")
fit_2 <- cfa(model_2factor, data = hope_data, estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml")

# results
fit_1_result <- summary(fit_1, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_2_result <- summary(fit_2, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_1wlsmv_result <- summary(fit_1_wlsmv, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_2wlsmv_result <- summary(fit_2_wlsmv, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

# #fit measures
# rbind(
#   Model1 = fitMeasures(fit_1, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic")),
#   Model2 = fitMeasures(fit_2, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic"))
# )

```

```{r}
# reliability check
hope_items <- dat_clean %>%
  select(paste0("hope_", 1:7))

alpha_iv <- alpha(hope_items)
omega_iv <- omega(hope_items, nfactors = 1)

alpha_iv$item.stats


#cat("Alpha:", alpha_iv, "\n")
#cat("Omega:", omega_iv, "\n")
```


```{r}
# Gradually deleting items with less than .4 factor loading (item 6 first)

# specify models
model_1factor_re <- '
Hope =~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_3 + hope_4 + hope_5 + hope_7
'

model_2factor_re <- '
Affective =~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_7
Cognitive =~ hope_3 + hope_4 + hope_5
'

# test default for ordinal data
fit_1_wlsmv_re <- cfa(model_1factor_re, data = hope_data, estimator = "WLSMV", missing = "pairwise")
fit_2_wlsmv_re <- cfa(model_2factor_re, data = hope_data, estimator = "WLSMV", missing = "pairwise")

# preregistered method
fit_1_re <- cfa(model_1factor_re, data = hope_data, estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml")
fit_2_re <- cfa(model_2factor_re, data = hope_data, estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml")

# results
fit_1_re_result <- summary(fit_1_re, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_2_re_result <- summary(fit_2_re, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_1wlsmv_re_result <- summary(fit_1_wlsmv_re, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_2wlsmv_re_result <- summary(fit_2_wlsmv_re, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)


# #fit measures
# rbind(
#   Model1 = fitMeasures(fit_1_re, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic")),
#   Model2 = fitMeasures(fit_2_re, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic"))
# )
```

```{r}
# Gradually deleting items with less than .4 factor loading (item 5 then)

# specify models
model_1factor_re2 <- '
Hope =~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_3 + hope_4 + hope_7
'

model_2factor_re2 <- '
Affective =~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_7
Cognitive =~ hope_3 + hope_4 
'

# test default for ordinal data
fit_1_wlsmv_re2 <- cfa(model_1factor_re2, data = hope_data, estimator = "WLSMV", missing = "pairwise")
fit_2_wlsmv_re2 <- cfa(model_2factor_re2, data = hope_data, estimator = "WLSMV", missing = "pairwise")

# preregistered method
fit_1_re2 <- cfa(model_1factor_re2, data = hope_data, estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml")
fit_2_re2 <- cfa(model_2factor_re2, data = hope_data, estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml")

# results
fit_1_re2_result <- summary(fit_1_re2, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_2_re2_result <- summary(fit_2_re2, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_1wlsmv_re2_result <- summary(fit_1_wlsmv_re2, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_2wlsmv_re2_result <- summary(fit_2_wlsmv_re2, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)


# #fit measures
# rbind(
#   Model1 = fitMeasures(fit_1_re, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic")),
#   Model2 = fitMeasures(fit_2_re, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic"))
# )
```

```{r}
# Gradually deleting items with less than .4 factor loading (item 7 last)

# specify models
model_1factor_re3 <- '
Hope =~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_3 + hope_4
'

model_2factor_re3 <- '
Affective =~ hope_1 + hope_2
Cognitive =~ hope_3 + hope_4 
'

# test default for ordinal data
fit_1_wlsmv_re3 <- cfa(model_1factor_re3, data = hope_data, estimator = "WLSMV", missing = "pairwise")
fit_2_wlsmv_re3 <- cfa(model_2factor_re3, data = hope_data, estimator = "WLSMV", missing = "pairwise")

# preregistered method
fit_1_re3 <- cfa(model_1factor_re3, data = hope_data, estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml")
fit_2_re3 <- cfa(model_2factor_re3, data = hope_data, estimator = "MLR", missing = "fiml")

# results
fit_1_re3_result <- summary(fit_1_re3, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_2_re3_result <- summary(fit_2_re3, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_1wlsmv_re3_result <- summary(fit_1_wlsmv_re3, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
fit_2wlsmv_re3_result <- summary(fit_2_wlsmv_re3, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

# #fit measures
# rbind(
#   Model1 = fitMeasures(fit_1_re, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic")),
#   Model2 = fitMeasures(fit_2_re, c("cfi","tli","rmsea","srmr","aic","bic"))
# )

anova(fit_1_re3, fit_2_re3)
anova(fit_1_wlsmv_re3, fit_2_wlsmv_re3)

lavTestLRT(fit_1_re3, fit_2_re3, method = "satorra.bentler.2001")

```

```{r}
# reading info from the 8 models. 
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(lavaan)

# Put all CFA models into a named list
cfa_models <- list(
  "7-item | One-factor" = fit_1,
  "7-item | Two-factor" = fit_2,
  "6-item | One-factor" = fit_1_re,
  "6-item | Two-factor" = fit_2_re,
  "5-item | One-factor" = fit_1_re2,
  "5-item | Two-factor" = fit_2_re2,
  "4-item | One-factor" = fit_1_re3,
  "4-item | Two-factor" = fit_2_re3
)

# Item information
model_info <- tibble(
  model_name = names(cfa_models),
  model_version = c("7-item", "7-item", "6-item", "6-item",
                    "5-item", "5-item", "4-item", "4-item"),
  items_retained = c("1–7", "1–7",
                     "1,2,3,4,6,7", "1,2,3,4,6,7",
                     "1,2,3,4,7", "1,2,3,4,7",
                     "1,2,3,4", "1,2,3,4"),
  model = c("One-factor", "Two-factor",
            "One-factor", "Two-factor",
            "One-factor", "Two-factor",
            "One-factor", "Two-factor")
)

# Extract fit indices
fit_table <- map_dfr(names(cfa_models), function(nm) {
  
  fit <- cfa_models[[nm]]
  
  fm <- fitMeasures(
    fit,
    c("chisq.scaled", "df.scaled", "pvalue.scaled",
      "cfi.robust", "tli.robust",
      "rmsea.robust", "rmsea.ci.lower.robust", "rmsea.ci.upper.robust",
      "srmr", "aic", "bic")
  )
  
  tibble(
    model_name = nm,
    chi_square = fm["chisq.scaled"],
    df = fm["df.scaled"],
    p = fm["pvalue.scaled"],
    CFI = fm["cfi.robust"],
    TLI = fm["tli.robust"],
    RMSEA = fm["rmsea.robust"],
    RMSEA_90_CI = paste0(
      round(fm["rmsea.ci.lower.robust"], 3),
      "–",
      round(fm["rmsea.ci.upper.robust"], 3)
    ),
    SRMR = fm["srmr"],
    AIC = fm["aic"],
    BIC = fm["bic"]
  )
})

# Combine with model labels and round
table_2 <- model_info %>%
  left_join(fit_table, by = "model_name") %>%
  select(
    model_version,
    items_retained,
    model,
    chi_square,
    df,
    p,
    CFI,
    TLI,
    RMSEA,
    RMSEA_90_CI,
    SRMR,
    AIC,
    BIC
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(chi_square, CFI, TLI, RMSEA, SRMR, AIC, BIC), ~ round(.x, 3)),
    p = round(p, 3)
  )

table_2

write.csv(table_2, "Fit indices across revised CFA models.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
